## Requirement

Example active FR with no tracker binding. Used by `tests/fixtures/v2-minimal/` as a regression anchor for the baseline v2 layout (FR-40, AC-49.8).

## Acceptance Criteria

- AC-X.1: Tracker-less FR renders correctly in INDEX
- AC-X.2: Status transitions (active → in_progress → archived) preserve filename stem

## Technical Design

Nothing to build — the fixture validates that tracker-less FRs pass every skill's regression probe without any Provider.sync() call.

## Testing

Captured in `snapshots/` by `verify-regression.ts` Schema M probe.

## Notes

None.
